bestPractices.question: Does the school district have sustainability integrated in the curriculum?
bestPractices.bestAnswer: Best practices include integrating sustainability into the curriculum through defined K-12 learning standards and environmental science classes, as well as supporting sustainability clubs. The statute should require school districts to commit to educating for a sustainable future by embedding these elements into their educational framework.

commonWeaknesses: 1 questions consistently score below 0.8 across municipalities
